visual_description: A man in a light blue shirt and dark tie sits in an office chair, adjusting his tie with his right hand while looking downward. The background shows horizontal blinds and office furniture, with a partial view of a blue filing cabinet. His gaze remains lowered as he continues adjusting his tie, maintaining a seated posture.
audio_description: The audio features a male voice speaking in a neutral tone with a moderate pace and pitch, accompanied by occasional background noise.
